PreToolUse.description: Track edits for quality gate checks

hooks.command: node -e "console.error('[ProWorkflow] Before commit: lint, typecheck, test?');console.error('[ProWorkflow] Run quality gates first: npm run lint && npm run typecheck')"

PreToolUse.description: Remind to run quality gates before commit

hooks.command: node -e "console.error('[ProWorkflow] Pushing to remote...');console.error('[ProWorkflow] Consider /wrap-up to capture learnings from this session')"

PostToolUse.description: Check for common issues after code edits

PostToolUse.matcher: tool == "Bash" && tool_input.command matches "(npm test|pnpm test|yarn test|pytest|go test)"

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const out=i.tool_output?.output||'';if(/fail|error|FAIL/i.test(out)){console.error('[ProWorkflow] Tests failed - fix before proceeding');console.error('[ProWorkflow] Consider: [LEARN] Testing: '+out.split('\n').find(l=>/fail|error/i.test(l))?.slice(0,80))}console.log(d)})"

Stop.description: Auto-capture [LEARN] blocks from responses into database

SessionStart.description: Load LEARNED patterns and previous session context

SessionEnd.description: Prompt for learnings and update LEARNED.md

UserPromptSubmit.description: Track prompts and detect correction patterns
Detect task drift and remind about original intent

ConfigChange.description: Detect when quality gates or hooks are modified mid-session

SubagentStop.description: Log subagent completion and capture results

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);console.error('[ProWorkflow] Task completed: '+(i.task_id||'unknown'));console.error('[ProWorkflow] Run quality gates before marking done');console.log(d)})"

TaskCompleted.description: Quality gate check when tasks are marked complete

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const tool=i.tool||'unknown';const cmd=(i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.command)||'';const dangerous=['rm -rf','docker','deploy','npm publish','push --force','reset --hard'];const isDangerous=dangerous.some(p=>tool.includes(p)||cmd.includes(p));if(isDangerous){console.error('[ProWorkflow] CAUTION: Dangerous operation requested: '+tool+(cmd?' cmd: '+cmd:''))}console.log(d)})"

PermissionRequest.description: Flag dangerous operations in permission requests

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);console.error('[ProWorkflow] Tool failed: '+(i.tool||'unknown'));console.error('[ProWorkflow] Consider: [LEARN] Debugging: Tool failure in '+(i.tool||'unknown'));console.log(d)})"

PostToolUseFailure.description: Track tool failures and suggest debugging learnings

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);console.error('[ProWorkflow] Teammate idle: '+(i.teammate_name||'unnamed'));console.error('[ProWorkflow] Consider reassigning or checking for blockers');console.log(d)})"

TeammateIdle.description: Detect idle teammates in agent teams
